title: SPYN v2.0.0: An Open-Source Python Platform with GUI for NMR Crystallography
description: SPYN is an open-source Python/PyQt5 desktop application providing a unified graphical interface for NMR crystallography workflows. It integrates four modules: (1) conformational search via genetic algorithm (OpenBabel), (2) Boltzmann population analysis, (3) solid-state NMR calculations using the GIPAW method (Quantum ESPRESSO), and (4) spectral visualisation with Lorentzian broadening and overlay of experimental/theoretical spectra. SPYN reduces a full GIPAW workflow from ≥11 manual command-line steps to 6 GUI interactions, making solid-state NMR crystallography accessible to non-specialist users.
